title: Alsine postii
taxonomy: Alsine postii is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the pink saxifrage. It belongs to the genus Alsine, which includes several species of saxifrage. The classification of Alsine postii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Caryophyllales, Family: Caryophyllaceae, Genus: Alsine, Species: A. postii. Alsine postii is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. The exact classification may be subject to slight variations depending on the source.
